responses: Hello! How can I help you?
Hi there! Ask me anything about Sabarish.
My name is Sabarish F S.
I studied Robotics and Automation at Loyola Institute of Technology and Science (Anna University) from 2021 to 2025.
My skills include Arduino, AutoCAD, IoT, C++, HTML, CSS, MySQL, and Automation.
I built a Bluetooth-controlled Robo Race Car with obstacle detection using ultrasonic sensors.
I also worked on an Automatic Guided Robotics System for container yard layout using IR sensors.
I am currently doing an internship in Robotics with Artificial Intelligence at Logiprompt Pro Academy.
I am a motivated Robotics Engineer aiming to work in the robotics industry and contribute to innovative AI-based projects.
You can contact me at 9442603694 or email me at fssabarish2@gmail.com.
My soft skills include Leadership, Time Management, Adaptability, Teamwork, and Interpersonal Skills.
